name: ponder
description: Self-evolving cognitive framework. 8-step structured reasoning pipeline + MMA knowledge system + automatic evolution. Code-enforced depth loop. Domain-agnostic.

interface.shortDescription: 8-step structured reasoning pipeline with self-evolving memory
interface.longDescription: Ponder is a self-evolving cognitive framework with an 8-step structured reasoning pipeline: divergent thinking -> multi-perspective scan -> blind spot discovery -> solution generation -> convergence -> scoring -> simulation -> debate. Includes MMA (Meridian Memory Architecture) for persistent knowledge, automatic rule evolution, and code-enforced depth loops. Domain-agnostic.
defaultPrompt: Help me analyze this problem with deep structured reasoning
Evaluate this decision from multiple perspectives
Compare these options with thorough analysis
